steps.t: Gírta, Sterkist, Varthmath, and Hállkell can all be found at the Beorninghús in the Beorning-lands. You should talk to Gírta, Sterkist, Varthmath, and…
The entrance to the Floodfells and Ylgraf can be found at the northern edge of the Beorning-lands. You should scout the entrance to the Floodfells and…
Grimbeorn can be found at the Beorninghús in the Beorninglands. You should talk to Grimbeorn.
